title: 人像写实摄影图
description: A striking black and white close-up portrait of a {argument name="subject description" default="handsome young Asian man"} with {argument name="hair style" default="messy wet hair sticking to his forehead"}. His face and
prompt_raw: A striking black and white close-up portrait of a {argument name="subject description" default="handsome young Asian man"} with {argument name="hair style" default="messy wet hair sticking to his forehead"}. His face and neck are glistening, covered in highly detailed {argument name="skin texture detail" default="water droplets and sweat"}. He has an intense, melancholic gaze directed off-camera to the left. The lighting is dramatic and high-contrast, emphasizing his sharp jawline, full lips, and specular highlights on the wet skin against a {argument name="background" default="pitch-black background"}. Shot in a photorealistic, high-fashion editorial style with cinematic chiaroscuro.

prompt_display_cn:
案例「subject description」属于摄影写实。这是一张摄影写实类案例，重点在真实镜头感、人物/物体质感、光线、景深、环境和摄影语言。适合改成商业摄影、人像摄影、产品摄影、纪实照片或电影剧照。

原始提示词要点：这条案例原文以英文描述画面，需要转成中文展示版。它的主要内容包括：A striking black and white close-up 肖像 of a 【subject description：handsome young Asian man】 with 【hair 风格：messy wet hair sticking to his forehead】. His face and neck are glistening, covered in highly detailed 【skin texture detail：water droplets and sweat】. He has an intense, melancholic gaze directed off-camera to the left. The 光线ing is dramatic and high-contrast, emphasizing his sharp jawline, full lips, and specular high光线s on the wet skin against a 【背景：pitch-black 背景】. Shot in a 照片写实, high-fashion editorial 风格 with 电影感 chiaroscuro.
prompt_template_cn:
生成一张【拍摄主题】的摄影写实画面。

主体：
画面主体是【主体对象】，处于【动作/状态】，具有真实自然的细节。

场景：
背景环境为【场景地点】，包含【环境元素】，整体氛围为【氛围】。

摄影语言：
使用【镜头类型/焦段】，构图为【构图方式】，光线为【光线条件】，景深为【景深效果】。

质感要求：
皮肤/材质/物体细节真实，避免塑料感和过度磨皮。画面像真实摄影作品。

输出要求：
比例为【画面比例】，风格为【摄影风格】。
